- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
Summary: arquivo criado em `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
Summary: confirmado projeto Next.js com TypeScript, dashboard de imobiliaria e catalogo publico.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
Summary: scaffold concluido com `create-next-app` no diretorio `.`.

- [x] Customize the Project
Summary: implementadas rotas `app/page.tsx` e `app/dashboard/page.tsx` com cadastro, edicao de preco, upload de fotos e status vendido.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
Summary: sem extensoes requeridas pelo `get_project_setup_info`.

- [x] Compile the Project
Summary: `npm run build` executado com sucesso, sem erros.

- [x] Create and Run Task
Summary: task `Dev Server` criada e iniciada com `npm run dev`.

- [ ] Launch the Project
Summary: depende de confirmacao do usuario para modo de debug/launch.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
Summary: `README.md` e `.github/copilot-instructions.md` atualizados com status atual do projeto.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
